raw_consumer_statement:
Barclays Bank. 
I have never used the card for an XXXX purchase that was charged and never made. It was a " chargeback '' so they say. I have never used the card for XXXX in the past or never in the future of that charge. 
I was then charged an annual fee, I called as soon as it was charged to close the account and dispute that charge as well, they said they could not credit it. 
I asked to close the account, not sure if they did it or not. 
I have an XXXX credit score and these people are out of control.
